label: Stat part (artificial buildings nearby offset)
description: Adds an offset based on the number of artificial buildings within a radius, evaluated against a curve.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping the count of nearby artificial buildings to the stat offset.

radius.label: Radius
radius.description: Search radius in cells for counting nearby artificial buildings.
